sections.paragraph: m. (for נְאֹד) plur. נאֹדֹות (once נאֹוד Jdg 4:19 כתיב), a bottle, as of milk, Jud. 4:19 of wine, 1Sa 16:20 Jos 9:4, 13 Jos 9:13. Bottles for keeping wine were hung up in the smoke, as is shewn by Psa 119:83. [This passage does not prove any such custom; it only shews that if so hung they would be spoiled.]
